availability_check: Yes it is currently in stock. Which size do you need?
bulk_price_inquiry: Bulk pricing available. Share product name and quantity for a custom quote.
care_instructions: Hand wash in cold water. Lay flat to dry to maintain shape.
category_inquiry: Our categories include saree, kurti, salwar, lehenga, shirts, jeans, and much more.
color_inquiry: We have dark, light, and pastel shades. What product are you checking?
complaint: We are sorry for your experience. Share details and we will resolve fast.
delivery_query: We deliver pan-India. Tamil Nadu gets free delivery. Other states have distance-based charges.
discount_inquiry: We have special prices on bulk orders and seasonal sales.
exchange_request: Yes we can exchange. Share order number and new size preference.
fit_inquiry: If you want a loose fit, we recommend going up one size.
greeting: Hi! Happy to help you find the perfect outfit today.
material_inquiry: We use velvet and blended fabrics. Light, breathable, and durable.
new_arrivals: We just added new salwar designs this week. Want to know more?
order_cancellation: Cancellation is possible before dispatch. Share your order ID.
order_modification: Share your order ID and the change required and I will update it.
order_status: Sorry for the wait. Share your order ID and I will update you right away.
payment_methods: We support UPI like Google Pay and PhonePe, cards, and COD.
place_order: You can order online easily. Need help selecting size or color?
price_inquiry: The jacket starts from Rs.699. Want more details?
product_browsing: We have a wide range of churidars. What style and size are you looking for?
restock_inquiry: Leave your contact and we will notify you when back in stock.
return_request: Returns accepted within 10 days of delivery. Share your order ID to start.
size_guide_request: Refer to our size chart on the product page or share your measurements.
size_inquiry: We stock sizes XS to 3XL. Which size do you need?
